Public Transport Information

MENU

PUBLIC TRANSPORTATION

In Istanbul, students are entitled to use all public transport (buses, trams, metro and ferries) at a reduced price with Istanbul Card. The cards are issued by the IETT (Public Transport Company) and only online applications are accepted.  Personal on-site applications are not accepted.

Please click here for your online application

How to Apply to Istanbul Student Card?

In order to get to our

Tuzla Campus

you may either use our shuttle buses from Kadıköy or Taksim or use  public transportation by taking

subway metro

from Kadıköy to Kartal and from Kartal taking the buses:

KM28

to Okan University.

Please see below for detailed information:

Click HERE to view OKAN University Shuttles

Public transport in Istanbul

comprises a bus network, various rail systems, funiculars, and maritime services. In order to use public transportation you should apply for Istanbul Card. Istanbul Card gives the students the opportunity to use public transport at reduced rates.

http://www.iett.gov.tr/en/main/pages/tunnel/154
